summary: Defines a DMX fixture profile — channel layout and addressing — and replicates that profile across every point/primitive in the input POP. Each input point becomes one fixture instance.

key_params.name: fixtureprofile
key_params.note: Built-in or custom fixture profile (channel set)

key_params.name: startchannel
key_params.note: Starting DMX channel for first fixture

key_params.name: fixturegap
key_params.note: Spacing between consecutive fixture address blocks

common_gotchas: Recognised optional input attributes: `DMXFixtureGap`, `DMXFixtureNetAddress`, `DMXFixtureChannel`, `DMXFixtureUniverse` — use them to per-point override the global params.
DMX Fixture POP doesn't transmit DMX itself — feed it into DMX Out POP, which sends over Art-Net / sACN / KiNET / FTDI.
Pair with Pan Tilt CHOP and DMX Map DAT for visualizing the universe layout while building the rig.
